sentence: 这份通知是由国务院办公厅发出的。
pinyin: Zhè fèn tōng zhī shì yóu guó wù yuàn bàn gōng tīng fā chū de.
english: This notice was issued by the General Office of the State Council.

meaning: the front (nose) of a plane etc
sentence: 飞机机头朝上，缓缓爬升。
pinyin: Fēi jī jī tóu cháo shàng, huǎn huǎn pá shēng.
english: The nose of the plane pointed upward as it slowly climbed.

sentence: 这个村子靠集体经济发展起来，大家收入都提高了。
pinyin: Zhè ge cūn zi kào jí tǐ jīng jì fā zhǎn qǐ lái, dà jiā shōu rù dōu tí gāo le.
english: This village developed through a collective economy, raising everyone's income.

sentence: 这门课介绍了光电子技术的基本原理。
pinyin: Zhè mén kè jiè shào le guāng diàn zi jì shù de jī běn yuán lǐ.
english: This course introduces the basic principles of photoelectronics technology.

sentence: 性教育课讲解了射精的生理过程。
pinyin: Xìng jiào yù kè jiǎng jiě le shè jīng de shēng lǐ guò chéng.
english: The sex education class explained the physiological process of ejaculation.

meaning: lament; sigh with emotion or regret
sentence: 看到老照片，他不禁感慨时光飞逝。
pinyin: Kàndào lǎo zhàopiàn, tā bùjīn gǎnkǎi shíguāng fēishì.
english: Looking at old photos, he couldn't help but sigh at how quickly time flies.

sentence: 天气太热了，他换上了一条短裤。
pinyin: Tiānqì tài rè le, tā huàn shàngle yī tiáo duǎnkù.
english: It was so hot that he changed into a pair of shorts.

sentence: 我们不能对社会上的丑恶现象视而不见。
pinyin: Wǒmen bù néng duì shèhuì shang de chǒu è xiànxiàng shì ér bù jiàn.
english: We can't turn a blind eye to the ugly and repulsive phenomena in society.

sentence: 运动员高举火炬跑进体育场。
pinyin: Yùndòng yuán gāo jǔ huǒjù pǎo jìn tǐyùchǎng.
english: The athlete ran into the stadium holding the torch high.

meaning: 1. uneven; 2. injustice; 3. unfairness; 4. wrong; 5. grievance; 6. ind
sentence: 他觉得这样处理太不平，心里不服气。
pinyin: Tā juéde zhèyàng chǔlǐ tài bù píng, xīnlǐ bù fúqì.
english: He felt the way things were handled was too unfair and couldn't accept it.

meaning: 1. to differentiate; 2. to distinguish; 3. to discriminate
sentence: 孩子要学会辨别是非对错。
pinyin: Hái zi yào xué huì biàn bié shì fēi duì cuò.
english: Children need to learn to distinguish right from wrong.

sentence: 他全心全意地照顾生病的父亲。
pinyin: Tā quán xīn quán yì de zhàogù shēngbìng de fùqīn.
english: He looked after his sick father wholeheartedly.

sentence: 这款轻型电动车很适合城市代步。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn qīng xíng diàn dòng chē hěn shì hé chéng shì dài bù.
english: This light electric vehicle is well-suited for getting around the city.

meaning: 1. independent and autonomous (idiom); self-determination; 2. to act i
sentence: 孩子长大了，要学会独立自主。
pinyin: Háizi zhǎng dà le, yào xuéhuì dúlì zìzhǔ.
english: As children grow up, they need to learn to be independent and self-reliant.

meaning: run by the local people; privately operated
sentence: 这是一所民办学校，收费较高。
pinyin: Zhè shì yī suǒ mínbàn xuéxiào, shōufèi jiào gāo.
english: This is a privately run school, so the fees are relatively high.

meaning: to tell the truth; honestly; in fact
sentence: 说真的，我不太喜欢那部电影。
pinyin: Shuō zhēn de, wǒ bù tài xǐhuān nà bù diànyǐng.
english: Honestly, I didn't really like that movie.

sentence: 新工作的薪资比以前高出不少。
pinyin: Xīn gōngzuò de xīnzī bǐ yǐqián gāochū bù shǎo.
english: The salary at the new job is considerably higher than before.

sentence: 我侄子今年刚上小学一年级。
pinyin: Wǒ zhízi jīnnián gāng shàng xiǎoxué yī niánjí.
english: My nephew just started first grade this year.

sentence: 老师让我们列出句子里的动词。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen lièchū jùzi lǐ de dòngcí.
english: The teacher asked us to list the verbs in the sentence.

sentence: 他在剧组负责制片工作。
pinyin: Tā zài jùzǔ fùzé zhìpiàn gōngzuò.
english: He is responsible for production work on the film crew.

sentence: 公司调整了员工的薪酬结构。
pinyin: Gōngsī tiáozhěng le yuángōng de xīnchóu jiégòu.
english: The company adjusted the employees' pay structure.

sentence: 我姨妈每年过年都来我们家。
pinyin: Wǒ yímā měi nián guònián dōu lái wǒmen jiā.
english: My maternal aunt comes to our home every Chinese New Year.

meaning: 1. reasonably priced; 2. inexpensive; 3. to keep prices down; 4. (curr
sentence: 这家超市以平价商品著称。
pinyin: Zhè jiā chāoshì yǐ píngjià shāngpǐn zhùchēng.
english: This supermarket is known for its reasonably priced goods.

sentence: 天文课上我们学习了天球坐标系。
pinyin: Tiānwén kè shàng wǒmen xuéxí le tiānqiú zuòbiāo xì.
english: In astronomy class we studied the celestial sphere coordinate system.

meaning: 1. to issue (a document); 2. to sign and issue officially
sentence: 领事馆已签发了他的签证。
pinyin: Lǐngshìguǎn yǐ qiānfā le tā de qiānzhèng.
english: The consulate has issued his visa.

sentence: 工程师测量了桥梁结构的刚度。
pinyin: Gōngchéngshī cèliáng le qiáoliáng jiégòu de gāngdù.
english: The engineer measured the stiffness of the bridge structure.

sentence: 边区的基础设施建设还有待加强。
pinyin: Biānqū de jīchǔ shèshī jiànshè hái yǒudài jiāqiáng.
english: Infrastructure development in the border area still needs to be strengthened.

sentence: 银行依法行使了对该公司的债权。
pinyin: Yínháng yīfǎ xíngshǐ le duì gāi gōngsī de zhàiquán.
english: The bank exercised its creditor's rights against the company in accordance with the law.

meaning: 1. great family; 2. rich family; 3. large landlord; 4. conspicuous spe
sentence: 他是股市里有名的大户。
pinyin: Tā shì gǔshì lǐ yǒumíng de dàhù.
english: He is a well-known major investor in the stock market.

sentence: 这款芯片专门用于信号处理。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn xīnpiàn zhuānmén yòng yú xìnhào chǔlǐ.
english: This chip is designed specifically for signal processing.

sentence: 昨晚他喝醉了，今天头还在疼。
pinyin: Zuó wǎn tā hēzuì le, jīntiān tóu hái zài téng.
english: He got drunk last night and still has a headache today.

sentence: 这幅肖像画把人物神态画得非常传神。
pinyin: Zhè fú xiàoxiàng huà bǎ rénwù shéntài huà de fēicháng chuánshén.
english: This portrait captures the subject's expression in a very vivid and lifelike way.

sentence: 报名人数多于预期，场地不够用了。
pinyin: Bàomíng rénshù duōyú yùqī, chǎngdì bùgòu yòng le.
english: The number of registrations exceeded expectations and the venue is not large enough.

sentence: 探测器已进入火星轨道。
pinyin: Tàncèqì yǐ jìnrù Huǒxīng guǐdào.
english: The probe has entered Mars orbit.

sentence: 听到这个消息，她忍不住叹息了一声。
pinyin: Tīng dào zhège xiāoxi, tā rěnbuzhù tànxī le yì shēng.
english: Upon hearing the news, she couldn't help but let out a sigh.

sentence: 补钙有助于维持骨骼健康。
pinyin: Bǔ gài yǒuzhù yú wéichí gǔgé jiànkāng.
english: Taking calcium supplements helps maintain bone health.

meaning: 1. to pour water into; 2. to inject water into
sentence: 工人正在向水箱注水。
pinyin: Gōngrén zhèngzài xiàng shuǐxiāng zhùshuǐ.
english: Workers are filling the water tank.

sentence: 喝了热牛奶后，她很快就入睡了。
pinyin: Hē le rè niúnǎi hòu, tā hěn kuài jiù rùshuì le.
english: After drinking warm milk, she fell asleep quickly.

sentence: 他得到了应得的奖励。
pinyin: Tā dédào le yīngdé de jiǎnglì.
english: He received the reward he deserved.

sentence: 他每天放学后都会玩一会儿电子游戏。
pinyin: Tā měitiān fàngxué hòu dōu huì wán yīhuìr diànzǐ yóuxì.
english: He plays video games for a while every day after school.

meaning: 1. high building; 2. multistory building; 3. skyscraper; 4. CL:座[zuò]
sentence: 城市中心矗立着许多高楼。
pinyin: Chéngshì zhōngxīn chùlì zhe xǔduō gāolóu.
english: Many tall buildings stand in the city center.

sentence: 长期熬夜会导致身体失衡。
pinyin: Chángqī áoyè huì dǎozhì shēntǐ shīhéng.
english: Staying up late for a long time can cause the body to become imbalanced.

sentence: 一位妇人在公园里散步。
pinyin: Yī wèi fùrén zài gōngyuán lǐ sànbù.
english: A woman was taking a walk in the park.

sentence: 他因盗窃罪正在服刑。
pinyin: Tā yīn dàoqiè zuì zhèngzài fúxíng.
english: He is serving a prison sentence for theft.

meaning: 1. the objects indicated; 2. as pointed out
sentence: 这个词的所指因地区不同而有差异。
pinyin: Zhège cí de suǒzhǐ yīn dìqū bùtóng ér yǒu chāyì.
english: What this word refers to differs by region.

sentence: 孩子们正在给图画着色。
pinyin: Háizimen zhèngzài gěi túhuà zhuósè.
english: The children are coloring the pictures.

sentence: 墙上的时钟显示现在是下午三点。
pinyin: Qiáng shàng de shízhōng xiǎnshì xiànzài shì xiàwǔ sān diǎn.
english: The clock on the wall shows it is three o'clock in the afternoon.

meaning: 1. vocal cords; 2. vocal folds; 3. (motion picture) soundtrack
sentence: 他感冒后声带发炎，说不了话。
pinyin: Tā gǎnmào hòu shēngdài fāyán, shuō bù liǎo huà.
english: After catching a cold, his vocal cords became inflamed and he couldn't speak.

sentence: 他偶然遇见了初恋，两人都很尴尬。
pinyin: Tā ǒurán yùjiàn le chūliàn, liǎng rén dōu hěn gāngà.
english: He ran into his first love by chance and both felt quite awkward.

meaning: 1. to frighten; 2. to horrify; 3. to terrify
sentence: 突然的雷声把孩子惊吓到了。
pinyin: Tūrán de léishēng bǎ háizi jīngxià dào le.
english: The sudden thunder frightened the child.
